summary: Implemented collect(uint256 positionId) on LPVault.sol — computes feeGrowthInside via _computeFeeGrowthInside, calculates owed fees using Q128 delta from feeGrowthInsideLastX128 snapshot, transfers USDC to position owner via new _safeTransfer helper, emits FeesCollected event. Added NotPositionOwner and PositionNotFound custom errors. Phase-independent (works in Active and WindDown). 21 integration tests covering all 6 scenarios plus FR assertions.
